programmes.show_description: Nasen Saadi stabbed two women at Bournemouth beach in 2024, killing one. Caught via CCTV and bank records, he denied guilt but was convicted for revenge-driven violence. S1, Ep10
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
A woman kicks her son out of her house on Mother's Day and is left to deal with a troubled teenager living in her basement. S24, Ep39
A musician accuses a man of destroying her $11,500 violin when he allegedly fell on it while intoxicated; he claims it was a medical condition. S24, Ep40
A woman sues her former friend for damages after she allegedly drove her car without permission and put oil in the transmission fluid pipe. S24, Ep41
A woman is accused of punching her friend in the face after he allegedly choked her; he is arrested the next day and sues her for damages. S24, Ep42
After a heated dogfight, a Pit Bull owner maces a neighbour's unleashed Dalmatian that was allegedly mauling his pet. S24, Ep43
Series presented by Nick Knowles which shows the split-second moments when everyday events are transformed into disasters and meets the people who lived to tell the tale. S4, Ep3/20
Series presented by Nick Knowles which shows the split-second moments when everyday events are transformed into disasters and meets the people who lived to tell the tale. S4, Ep4/20
Series presented by Nick Knowles which shows the split-second moments when everyday events are transformed into disasters and meets the people who lived to tell the tale. S4, Ep5/20
Put the pleasure back into shopping from the comfort of your home and choose from a selection of innovative products.
A woman claims she was frightened for her and her children's lives by an ex-boyfriend; he presents texts that tell a different story. S22, Ep191
A woman charges at the allegedly drunk father of her child, jumps on his back and beats him on the head; she sues him for a false arrest S22, Ep192
A man's death, a valuable witness and a car allegedly sold on consignment come into play when a Cadillac sale goes bad. S22, Ep193
Ex-girlfriends fight over the alleged commercialisation of personal artwork intended to demonstrate acceptance and love during a major life transition. S22, Ep194
A simple carpool to worship service ends in an auto accident and a hefty insurance settlement debate. S22, Ep195
A woman airs her dirty laundry with the world when she discovers the father of her child is cheating on her. S24, Ep44
A couple wait three years for a man's prison release to start their relationship, only to have it end with a heated assault. S24, Ep45
A teenager accuses a teacher of punching him in the chest during an incident at school; the teacher countersues for attorney fees and punitive damages. S16, Ep32
Teenagers brawl in a parking lot and the police are called in; damages from alleged kicking, spitting on and keying cars are disputed. S16, Ep33
A little boy bursts into tears after taking the stand; he accuses another child of throwing a rock and hitting him in the eye. His mother sues for damages. S16, Ep34
A recovering drug addict allegedly gets hooked on opiates again after moving into an illegal apartment in a home where two teens live. He is sued for back rent and medical expenses. S16, Ep35
Smashing a wine glass over a man's head and causing thousands of dollars in medical bills is the accusation laid against a woman; she claims he was aggressively hitting on her. S16, Ep36
A fire causes property damage leaving a man and his girlfriend to sue their former landlord for damages and the return of their security deposit. S16, Ep37
A single mother demands that her ex-lover pay her back for alleged loans to pay other outstanding loans and utility bills. S16, Ep38
A mother is accused of treating her adult daughter like a baby when she stands up for her in court. Her daughter claims she was conned into paying more rent than was fair. S16, Ep39
Nine stitches are required after a man is hit in the head with a guitar; video evidence is submitted which shows the on-stage accident. S16, Ep40
Racial profiling during a routine traffic stop is the accusation laid against a veteran California cop who sues motorists for filling an allegedly false complaint against him. S16, Ep41
A man sues his teenage son for return of a pet after his son decides to work at a cinema instead of going to college. S24, Ep46
A woman fights to gain custody of her 11-year-old granddaughter; the child's mother accuses her of kidnapping. S24, Ep47
A woman accused a graphic designer of scamming her out of $1.000 after he allegedly failed to deliver a website. S24, Ep48
A series of seemingly random shootings have terrorised the city of East Point. Police are baffled as to the killer's motive, and when he will strike again. S6, Ep5
Reggie Reed has wrestled with the question of who murdered his mother decades ago. A fresh look at the evidence ultimately implicated Reed's father. S37, Ep25
Nurse Beverley Allitt murdered four children and harmed nine more in Lincolnshire, abusing trust until a pattern of deaths exposed her. S1, Ep4
Spoiled Elliot Turner, enraged when Emily Longley rejected him, murdered her in 2011 in Dorset. The investigation imprisoned Turner and convicted his parents for the cover up. S3, Ep9
A couple set up a weapons business in West Virginia. All is not what it seems, leading to a fatal end. S1, Ep2
Explore how cult leader Jeffrey Lundgren ordered a series of ritualistic killings. S1, Ep5

A reverend is sued for the return of money he was paid to gather signatures for an election ballot, many of which turned out to be invalid. S16, Ep62
A domestic dispute ends when LeMarcus Bell is killed by Tyra Whitney - his girlfriend's mother. Most mothers would do anything for their daughters. But how many would kill? S4, Ep8
Series presented by Nick Knowles which shows the split-second moments when everyday events are transformed into disasters and meets the people who lived to tell the tale. S4, Ep6/20
A dad wheeling his son to playgroup and a waitress chatting outside a café, must take evasive action as an out of control car careers onto the pavement. S4, Ep1/20
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
An expecting mother allows her boyfriend to send risqué photos of them together to his ex-girlfriend who allegedly punches her in the head. S22, Ep161
A woman sues her ex-fiancé for an alleged loan to pay off his debt; he claims he spent plenty of money on her when they were together. S22, Ep162
After a woman accuses her estranged husband of using corporal punishment on their children, he turns to a new 'girlfriend' for help with a divorce attorney. S22, Ep163
A woman asks her nanny for thousands of dollars in order to send her 8-year-old daughter to cheerleading camp; her nanny wants payback. S22, Ep164
A dog perishes in an apartment fire caused by the pet's owner; the renter then sues the landlord and contractor for damages to his belongings. S16, Ep26
A poker party ends in thousands of dollars in alleged damages when a married couple finds deep scratches on their hardwood floor; they blame a card dealer. S16, Ep27
A second DUI leaves a woman with 320 hours of community service to complete; she claims a pastor swindled her into free labour. S16, Ep28
A PTA president sues the father of a promising scholarship winner after he fails to get her on the bus for a prestigious tour of colleges. S16, Ep29
A man purchases and overhauls a famous 30-year-old tour bus, only to have it break down four times while driving cross-country. S24, Ep49
A caregiver claims she suffered from a stroke and Lupus while caring for an elderly man whose son sues her for a large unpaid loan. S24, Ep50
A man charges into a crowded church service screaming that his sister kidnapped his mother, and later claims she also stole $50,000 from her. S24, Ep51
What are the odds that the day after disgruntled tenants move out, their previous home goes up in smoke? A fight over damaged property ensues. S22, Ep196
The Judge warns a young man that he'll never take a happy picture if he keeps the camera his ex-lover allegedly gifted to him. S22, Ep197
An elderly woman's backyard landscape is allegedly ruined when a neighbour's brother takes a whack at her trees; he is sued for trespassing and vandalism. S22, Ep198
A woman claims poor health forced her to miss car payments to her aunt who is $9,000 in the hole because of her good deed. S22, Ep199
A woman claims that her next door neighbours tore her fence down in the middle of the night; police are called when their feud gets physical. S22, Ep200
An uninsured motorist claims she was held by another driver until police arrived after she allegedly hit his car; video of the collision is revealed. S22, Ep201
Nine police officers allegedly come to the rescue of women who accuse their roommate of assault; he is horrified by their claim. S22, Ep202
Lying teenagers, rocks thrown at cars from a bridge, and felony charges come into play when $7,000 in restitution fees is disputed by angry parents. S18, Ep1
Two young women attending a video game convention claim they were forced to sleep in their car after seven men showed up in the room they rented. S18, Ep2
A 14-year-old boy is accused of shooting out a woman's car windshield with a pellet gun. The boy denies the charge. S18, Ep3
A driver delivering honey is sued by her boss for taking the company car without permission and wrecking it. S18, Ep4
Faria Khan hated her husband, Nawajid. Instead of divorce, she hired a group to execute a calculated, cold-blooded murder plot. S3, Ep3
A manager taking a gamble with an NHS credit card; and a dance troupe boss steals thousands of pounds. S2, Ep6
Eddie Mosley had a prolific criminal history, but believed he was not doing anything wrong. Join Dr Bryanna Fox as she examines Mosley's descent to being a serial killer. S1, Ep3
Hannegret Donnelly secretly abused her husband for years in Buckinghamshire. He was found dead with 78 injuries, exposing the systematic domestic cruelty. S3, Ep10
